comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting remediation for SNYK-PYTHON-BLACK-15518063: bump black from 25.11.0 to >=26.3.1, then run Python lint checks and make check.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Decision update: stakeholder approved dropping Python 3.9 support to allow using black 26.3.1 (fixed for CVE-2026-32274). Updating requires-python to >=3.10 and revalidating.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented remediation: updated python requires-python to >=3.10,<4.0, bumped black to >=26.3.1, regenerated python/poetry.lock to black 26.3.1, and removed Python 3.9 from CI matrix. Validation passed: black --check, ruff check, and full make check (Python/Rust lint, specs, 100% coverage, parity).
